calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch; Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Respondent Sylvie Krawec is not present.
Julian T. Lastowski, Esq. is appearing on behalf of Appellant Abouata.
Appellant Sandra Abouata is also present.

This matter comes on calendar for a trial de novo. Appellant Abouata is sworn.

No appearance is made by the Respondent. The court hears from counsel Lastowski as to the history and factual issues of this matter.

The court determines that Appellant Abouata is to be removed from the original judgment, but the judgment will remain in full force as to the other named debtor, Maurice Moganam.

Matter is adjourned.
